name: Calzone
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove dough from machine and roll it into circles of approximately 8 inches.
2. Spread filling on one half of the circle, leaving a border around it for closing.
3. Fold the unfilled side over the filled side and crimp the edges closed with your fingers or a fork.
4. Place on a lightly greased baking pan. Let rise for about 30 minutes.
5. Brush lightly with olive oil and bake at 500°F (250°C) for 20-30 minutes, or until puffed and golden.
My favorite filling:
SPINACH FILLING: Saute thawed spinach in olive oil and garlic powder until all water has evaporated (squeeze out excess liquid first). Mix cheeses into the spinach. You may substitute frozen chopped broccoli for spinach.
